scores.correctness_notes: Partially correct — gets the concept of certificate_available event and initial relation setup right, but misses CertificateDeniedEvent entirely and describes a different library (ops-lib-tls-certificates v4) rather than charmlibs-interfaces-tls-certificates v1 as specified in the gold standard. The 'when to request' section omits error code handling (ip_not_allowed, domain_not_allowed, etc.).
scores.hallucination_notes: The `.sync()` method appears to be fabricated — no evidence this exists in any version of the library. `TLSCertificatesRequiresV4` and `CertificateRequestAttributes` are real v4 APIs but from the older library, not the current charmlibs v1. The `refresh_events` parameter exists in v4 but not in the library the question is about.
